message:
test(infra): expand CI gate wire assertions, inline format args, reformat perf budgets

ci_full_suite_gate.rs: Add 16 new required assertion strings to
`run_all_wires_scenario_cell_status_artifacts_into_evidence_contract`,
covering regression guard structural validation (object shape, required
fields, format, known reasons, status values, reason alignment),
failure/gap reason tracking, and several claim integrity checks
(missing/stale evidence, missing required result fields, scenario-SLI
mapping, SLI thresholds, absolute/relative values, evidence class,
confidence labels, microbench-only claims, and global claim partition
coverage).

bench_schema.rs: Replace `format!("{:?}", var)` with inline `{var:?}`
syntax in the stage_summary missing_cells validation error message,
following Rust 2021 convention and eliminating a clippy lint.

perf_budgets.rs: Reformat long `build_binary_size_candidate_paths` call
to wrap the argument list across lines (rustfmt line-length compliance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
